title: AI AMAZE 數據源與可視化模板
updated_focus: Use 2026-05-22-ai-amaze-observability as the source artifact; exclude the prior Excel from this version; include the same new observability requirements as the English version.
note: Chinese version now includes machine/game extension events, retail minute-level click timestamps, click-to-conversation linkage, backend tests as a resource, and AI language judgment.
data_source_section: spreadsheet-style event form/table, one row per event
visualization_section: formal dashboard mockup with date/project/channel/language filters, KPI, trend, intent, coverage, quality, AI language heatmap, retail click-to-conversation timeline, machine/backend-test resource panel, ROI calculator, and action queue
